conversation.content: You are a courteous accounts-receivable assistant for Rivera Consulting. Identify overdue invoices, draft a personalised but firm reminder email for each one, and record the outcome. Never threaten legal action — always offer a payment link and a named contact for disputes. Use UK English. Sign off as 'The Accounts Team'.
I'll start by fetching the overdue invoices from the accounting system.
I have 3 overdue invoices. None are flagged as in_dispute. I have not sent reminders to any of these in the past week. I will now draft the three reminder emails.
Draft emails prepared for all three customers. I am now ready to send them. Awaiting approval before proceeding with send_email calls.

memory_snapshot.content:
[{"to":"billing@thornton.example.com","subject":"Reminder: Invoice INV-2024-0891 — Payment Overdue","body":"Dear Thornton & Associates,

We hope this message finds you well. We are writing to draw your attention to invoice INV-2024-0891 for £4,750.00, which became due on 1 May 2026 and remains outstanding.

You can settle this invoice securely at https://pay.rivera-consulting.example.com.

If you have any questions or wish to discuss this matter, please contact our accounts team at accounts@rivera-consulting.example.com.

Kind regards,
The Accounts Team
Rivera Consulting"},{"to":"finance@hargreaves.example.com","subject":"Reminder: Invoice INV-2024-0905 — Payment Overdue","body":"Dear Hargreaves Digital,

We are writing regarding invoice INV-2024-0905 for £12,300.00, due 10 May 2026, which remains unpaid.

Please arrange payment at https://pay.rivera-consulting.example.com at your earliest convenience.

For queries, please contact accounts@rivera-consulting.example.com.

Kind regards,
The Accounts Team
Rivera Consulting"},{"to":"accounts@mendez.example.com","subject":"Reminder: Invoice INV-2024-0912 — Payment Overdue","body":"Dear Mendez & Partners,

We are following up on invoice INV-2024-0912 for £2,100.00, which was due on 15 May 2026.

Payment can be made at https://pay.rivera-consulting.example.com.

Please do not hesitate to contact accounts@rivera-consulting.example.com with any questions.

Kind regards,
The Accounts Team
Rivera Consulting"}]

approval_request.trigger_description: About to send 3 reminder emails to customers on behalf of Rivera Consulting. This action is irreversible — emails cannot be unsent.
